author: gaut3
description: Track flexible work hours and time off with built-in timer, visualizations, and statistics. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: gaut3
manifest.description: Track flexible work hours and time off with built-in timer, visualizations, and statistics.
manifest.name: timeflow

name: timeflow

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Calculation-correctness pass from a full code review. Focus: the time/balance math must be
right under every workday/week configuration.

> **Heads-up:** several balance-semantics fixes below (avspasering no longer double-charging,
> lunch deducted once per day, alternating weeks honored, averages derived from your actual
> work-days setting) will **legitimately change your historical flextime numbers**. This is
> the numbers becoming correct, not data loss — no action needed.

### Fixed
- **Data corruption:** timestamps ending at exactly midnight are no longer rewritten to
  08:00 on load (only legacy full-day entries with both start AND end at 00:00 are);
  expanded (non-collapsed) Timekeep groups no longer drop their sub-entries' hours;
  imports now store local-format timestamps (was UTC `Z`, which double-counted entries on
  re-import and shifted displayed clock times); Timekeep imports with numeric epoch
  timestamps no longer produce invalid `NaN` dates; the "Log work" calendar modal also
  stored UTC — fixed.
- **Balance/goal engine:** work + avspasering on the same day no longer double-charges the
  balance (withdrawn hours now cover the goal gap); alternating weeks are now respected by
  the daily goal (previously only calendar coloring honored them) and the week-parity no
  longer breaks after 53-ISO-week years; lunch break is deducted once per **day** (was per
  entry — split days lost 30 min per extra segment); a running timer now only defers
  *today* from the balance (a forgotten timer no longer hides that whole past day's hours
  and withdrawals); per-entry flextime on mixed work+studie/kurs days now sums to the same
  delta as the balance; date-only strings are parsed as local dates (west-of-UTC timezones
  previously had every date shifted one day — Mondays treated as Sunday); half-day markers
  on no-hours-required types (e.g. `helligdag:half`) now yield a half-day goal; the
  `annet:HH:MM-HH:MM:` planned-day format now parses correctly.
- **Displays:** week-compliance dots and bar-chart targets now use the schedule-history-
  and holiday-aware daily goal (historical weeks were graded against *current* settings);
  the hero "added today" badge and the day drawer now use the same per-entry flextime sum
  as history (avspasering/sick days no longer show misleading day balances); day drawer
  time ranges are parsed, not sliced from raw strings; overtime-payout offers are based on
  lunch-adjusted work hours (no more paying out overtime you never earned); a stale
  running timer from another day no longer inflates "today"/"this week"; planned days
  that are *today* show in the Upcoming list; dashboard refreshes no longer leak update
  intervals (CPU grew with every timer start/stop).
- **Migrations:** run independently (an earlier `||` chain ran at most one per restart);
  the sick-day migration is now run-once and no longer reverts user-customized behaviors
  on every load; import duplicate detection compares instants, not raw strings.
- **Settings & export:** numeric settings accept a decimal comma (`37,5` is no longer
  read as `37`); "reset to default" buttons work again (settings defaults were being
  mutated by reference on load); editing your current schedule no longer overwrites a
  schedule period you'd set up for a future date; two schedule periods can't share the
  same start date; average-workload stats now derive expected work days from your actual
  work-days setting instead of a fixed 5-day week (this can shift monthly/yearly averages
  for non–5-day schedules); CSV export groups months by local date (entries near a month
  boundary no longer land in the wrong month) and the in-view export's type breakdown now
  lists custom absence types too; a running timer now refreshes every open dashboard, not
  just the last one opened; stopping a work timer reports the lunch-adjusted duration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Two small fixes to the calendar day drawer, plus a few text-label fixes.

### Fixed

- **Add work time to a day you forgot to clock into** — opening a past day with no
  entries only offered "Add absence", so a day you forgot to track could only be
  fixed by hand-editing the data file. "Edit time" now shows an inline add-work form
  (start/end time + Save, same as editing an existing entry).
- **"Done" button is readable in edit mode** — the edit toggle's active state showed
  accent-colored text on a near-background fill, so "Done" was nearly invisible on
  some themes. The active button now fills with the accent color like other active
  controls.
- **Absence comment hints match the type again** — the example shown in the comment
  box was stuck on the vacation one ("e.g. Vacation in Spain") for every absence
  type; sick leave, welfare leave, courses, etc. now show their own example again.
- **A couple of labels showed their internal name instead of text** — the "Duration"
  label in the "Other" absence form and the "leave empty for full day" hint on sick
  time rendered a raw key (e.g. `modals.duration`) instead of the translated label.
  Both now display correctly in Norwegian and English.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A small fix to the weekly progress bar's label.

### Fixed

- **Weekly progress bar now shows your weekly goal** — the week bar filled toward
  your weekly goal but was labelled with the weekly *compliance limit* (which
  defaults to 40h for Norwegian labour law and is editable under Settings →
  Compliance → "Weekly hours limit"). So a 26h15m weekly goal showed "40h" on the
  bar, not matching its fill. The week bar now shows your goal, like the day bar
  already did; the compliance limit still colors the bar orange/red when you cross
  it. Reported by [@erkannt](https://github.com/erkannt) — Timeflow's first
  community bug report. Thanks!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A small follow-up to 2.0.3.

### Fixed

- **Hero progress bars update through the day** — the Today/Week bars (and the
  compliance badge) include the running timer's accumulating hours, but only
  refreshed when a timer started or stopped, so the "day bar" looked frozen
  until a reload. They now refresh on the periodic tick.
- **Calendar dates vertically centered** — day cells (both the wide grid and the
  sidebar/phone view) pinned the date to the top; the day number now sits
  centered in the cell with its colored bar anchored at the bottom.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A small follow-up: CSS-compatibility and README image fixes.

### Fixed

- **Taller calendar days in the sidebar / on phone** — narrow-layout day cells
  had no minimum height, so on a phone (where the columns are wide) they read as
  flat, too-wide boxes. They now get the same ≥44px height as the wide layout.
- **Heatmap CSS compatibility** — replaced the heatmap grid's `column-gap` with
  the `gap` shorthand so it no longer trips the Obsidian CSS review's
  "multicolumn only partially supported" warning (it was only grid spacing).
- **README logos load on the Obsidian plugin page** — the header wordmark and
  footer lockup used repo-relative paths that only resolve on GitHub; switched
  to absolute image URLs (like the screenshots), so they render everywhere
  instead of showing alt text.

### Docs

- Heatmap screenshot updated to the redesigned, combined light/dark view.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
UI polish and localization fixes from a design review, plus refreshed
screenshots. No change to the minimum Obsidian version (1.7.2).

### Changed

- **Heatmap redesigned** — the work-history heatmap is now a GitHub-style
  contribution grid: weeks run as columns, weekdays (Mon–Sun) as rows, with
  **month labels** across the top, **weekday anchors** down the left, and a
  **color legend** that maps each color to its meaning, so it's readable without
  hovering. It scales with the window width like the rest of the dashboard.
- **Weekly-hours chart** — value labels are pinned on a single line above a
  fixed-height bar track, instead of floating at each bar's top and grazing the
  bars at inconsistent heights.
- **Wide history "Comment" column** is hidden when nothing in the visible range
  has a comment (it stays in inline-edit mode), instead of showing a full column
  of "-".
- **Even spacing between wide stats sections** — each section had more space below
  it than above (a stacked margin + gap); top and bottom are now balanced.

### Added

- **Compliance-dot key** — a clickable "?" above the calendar's week-number
  column opens a popover explaining the green / orange / red week-status dots
  (on target / under / over); the same key is also in the status-bar info panel.
- **Goal vs limit tooltips** — the daily "goal" and weekly "limit" stats now
  carry a one-line tooltip clarifying daily target vs weekly ceiling.

### Fixed

- **English uses "h" for hours.** The hour unit now follows the interface
  language (English → "h", Norwegian → "t") until you set it explicitly, so an
  English dashboard no longer shows the Norwegian "t". Existing English setups
  are corrected automatically on load, and a few spots that hard-coded "t" were
  fixed to respect the setting.
- **Pluralization.** A count of one no longer reads as plural — "1 active timer"
  (not "1 active timers"), "1 day" (not "1 days"), in both languages, via a
  shared `plural()` helper with per-language forms.

### Docs

- README screenshots refreshed: new combined light/dark home shots for the wide
  and sidebar layouts, plus updated history and heatmap images.

### Internal

- The release workflow now pulls this changelog's matching `## [version]` section
  into the GitHub release notes automatically, so releases and the changelog stay
  in sync.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Maintenance release — clears the outstanding Obsidian community-plugin review
recommendations and a Dependabot security advisory. No user-facing changes; the
dashboard, settings, and minimum Obsidian version (1.7.2) are unchanged.

### Security

- **esbuild upgraded to 0.28.1** (from 0.25.x) to resolve Dependabot advisory
  GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99 (esbuild dev server). esbuild is a build-time dependency
  only and was never shipped inside the plugin, but this clears the alert.

### Internal

- Replaced the deprecated `ButtonComponent.setWarning()` calls with a
  version-safe equivalent (identical warning styling) — clears the deprecation
  without raising the minimum Obsidian version.
- Removed an unused import and cleaned up two unnecessary type assertions flagged
  by the Obsidian community-plugin review.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
A ground-up redesign of the dashboard. The old day / week / month / stats **card
grid** is gone; in its place is a single, calmer dashboard built around one
question — *where's my flextime balance?* The same layout now adapts from a wide
two-column view down to a narrow sidebar **without dropping any features**, and
structural colors come straight from Obsidian's own theme variables, so it looks
at home in any light or dark theme.

> **⚠️ Requires Obsidian 1.7.2 or newer.** The minimum supported version was
> raised from `0.15.0` to `1.7.2`. If you're on an older Obsidian, update the app
> before installing 2.0.0.

### The redesigned dashboard

- **Flextime balance hero** — your balance is now the centerpiece: a large,
  color-coded number with a live clock, today's contribution, and Start/Stop
  timer controls in one place (replaces the old summary cards and badge row).
- **Weekly progress strip** — at-a-glance bars showing this week's hours against
  your goal, colored by compliance status.
- **Interactive bar calendar** — a month grid where each day carries a thin,
  type-colored bar; **today** is outlined rather than filled, future days are
  dimmed (planned absences stay visible), and week numbers + per-week compliance
  dots are optional. Each compliance dot has a hover tooltip.
- **Inline day drawer** — click any calendar day to open an in-place drawer to
  view the day, add or edit work time, register an absence, or create a note —
  no separate context-menu dialog.
- **Statistics grid** — switch between month / year / total for hours logged,
  daily and weekly averages, workload %, work days, and comp-time used.
- **Trends** — "vs last week / vs last month" deltas with direction arrows.
- **Weekly chart** — recent weeks at a glance.
- **Upcoming planned days** — consecutive same-type days now collapse into clean
  date-range rows (e.g. `6.–16. July · 8 days · Vacation`) instead of one row per
  day.
- **Leave tracking panel** — per-type usage against each yearly quota (days for
  leave types, hours for comp time); quota-less types show the value with no bar.

### Added

- **Two-lane color system** — color now does one job at a time: your theme
  **accent** drives chrome (Start button, today's outline) while a separate
  **status palette** (green / amber / red) signals work-hour compliance, so a
  normal state never looks like an alarm.
- **Accessibility floor on bars** — progress/leave bars are at least 8px and
  calendar bars at least 4px, and status is carried by fill *color*, not bar
  height.
- **Optional background override** — set a custom dashboard background per light
  and dark theme (off by default; the only sanctioned theme override — everything
  else defers to your theme).
- **Sidebar / mobile parity** — the narrow layout keeps the full feature stack
  (balance, calendar, leave tracking, history); nothing is dropped on mobile.
- **"See all / Show less"** — long history and leave sections expand and collapse
  in place instead of rebuilding the whole dashboard. Expanded history is now
  grouped by month.
- **Brand assets** — added a full set of Timeflow icon / wordmark / lockup logos
  (SVG + PNG, in light/dark/black/white) under `brand/`.

### Changed

- **Minimum Obsidian version raised to 1.7.2** (was 0.15.0).
- **Responsive layout reworked** — one layout that switches between wide
  (two-column, with the stats grid, weekly chart, and bulk history editing) and
  narrow/sidebar at 600px, instead of two divergent experiences.
- **Calendar, history, leave, and stats moved onto theme variables** — structural
  colors follow Obsidian's own light/dark variables, so any theme works with zero
  setup; per-type colors stay fully customizable.
- **Trend "down" is no longer alarm-red** — fewer hours isn't an error, so the
  down-arrow uses a muted color; red is reserved for real threshold breaches.
- **Zero values are muted** — empty comp-time and leave counts read as quiet
  rather than using a behavior accent color.
- **Documentation refreshed** — the README was rewritten around the new dashboard
  (balance hero, progress strip, bar calendar, inline drawer, trends, upcoming
  ranges, leave tracking) with new light/dark screenshots, and the color-coding
  and requirements sections were corrected.

### Fixed

- **History dates** now format per locale everywhere; entries use type chips
  tinted from the day type's color, with signed and color-coded flextime.
- **Calendar compliance dots** are gated to finished workweeks only (no premature
  "incomplete week" warnings).
- **Filter chips, "See all" buttons, and other controls** were reworked to flat,
  non-accent styling that matches the rest of the UI (they previously inherited
  Obsidian's default button box and accent text).
- **Quota-less leave rows** render value-only instead of an empty bar that read as
  "failed to load."
- Addressed items from the Obsidian community-plugin review (unused imports,
  redundant type assertions, and release-packaging fixes).

### Removed

- **The legacy v1.x "cards" UI** — the old day/week/month/stats card renderers,
  badge row, and status bar were removed along with their hardcoded green/blue
  gradient legend (replaced wholesale by the new dashboard).
- **Decorative emoji in chrome** that shipped with the old card layer (your own
  per-type icons are unaffected — those are your data).

### Internal

- Removed a large orphaned render layer left over from the redesign (~1,100 lines
  of dead code), shrinking the bundle.
- Release workflow now triggers on a plain `x.y.z` tag (no `v` prefix), so the
  release tag matches `manifest.json` exactly as Obsidian requires.
- i18n expanded with new strings and a date "range" format for the collapsed
  upcoming rows. (Known gap: the settings tab is still largely English.)

[2.0.0]: https://github.com/gaut3/timeflow/releases/tag/2.0.0

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Fixed comment popup showing time over threshold instead of time over daily goal when stopping a timer
- Fixed sentence case for UI text (`Id` → `ID`, `m` → `min`)
- Removed unnecessary type assertions in history table display code
- Fixed half-day + avspasering on same date in holidays.md triggering a false duplicate warning and losing the half-day flag

### Maintenance
- Removed unused `@typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin` and `@typescript-eslint/parser` devDependencies, eliminating 133 transitive packages and 4 Dependabot vulnerability alerts (flatted, minimatch, picomatch)

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description: Fixes for the Obsidian review guidelines.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
New Features
Overtime Payout: Added ability to mark overtime hours for payout instead of counting toward flextime balance
Checkbox and hours:minutes input in the edit work entries modal (last entry of the day)
Payout amount auto-fills with calculated overtime, can be reduced but not exceed overtime
Displayed in history table (both narrow and wide views), calendar info panel, and CSV export
Subtracts from flextime balance and shown as net flextime in history
Bug Fixes
Colon auto-fill in log work modal: Time inputs now auto-insert : after typing 2 digits, matching the edit modal behavior
Half day calculation with work percent: Half day hours now correctly account for work percentage
Previously: 50% of base workday (e.g., 4h for 8h base)
Now: 50% of adjusted workday (e.g., 3.2h for 8h base at 80% position)
Fixed in daily goal calculation, week/month breakdowns, and compliance displays

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes
Fixed week compliance badge not accounting for half-day hours - The calendar's week compliance indicator now correctly calculates expected hours when a day is marked as a "half day" (4-hour day). Previously, half-days were counted as full work days, causing the badge to show incorrect compliance status (e.g., showing 15 hours expected instead of 11.5 hours for a week with one full day and one half day).

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes
Week compliance badge - Now correctly accounts for ferie/avspasering entries from both holidays.md and timer entries in data.md
Holiday parsing - Fixed regex to allow empty descriptions in holidays.md (e.g., - 2025-12-23: ferie: now works)
Holiday conversion - Past planned absences (ferie, avspasering, etc.) now correctly convert to timer entries
Timezone issues - Fixed date comparison logic to avoid timezone-related bugs when converting holidays
Improvements
i18n strings - Added new translation strings for system status warnings (errors, warnings, data parse errors, holiday parse errors, etc.)
System status - Hardcoded Norwegian strings replaced with translatable i18n keys
Technical
More robust holiday type detection with explicit list of convertible types
Improved date string comparison to avoid new Date() timezone edge cases

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes
Fixed flextime calculation for partial avspasering days - When combining work and avspasering on the same day, flextime was incorrectly calculated. Work hours were treated as bonus instead of being compared against the daily goal. Now:
Full-day avspasering: Goal is 0, only withdrawal from balance
Partial avspasering + work: Work is compared against normal goal (7.5h), avspasering withdraws separately
Week compliance badge now accounts for sick leave (egenmelding) - Weekly goal is properly reduced when sick days are present
Bar chart target markers - Target line now shows per-bar adjusted goals instead of a single horizontal line, reflecting goal reductions from special days
Code Quality
Removed inline styles to comply with Obsidian plugin guidelines (using CSS classes and setCssProps() instead)
Removed unused variable in dataManager.ts

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Enhanced System Status Warnings
Added new warnings to help identify potential data issues early:
Data file parse error - Critical warning when data.md contains invalid JSON. Shows a notice and prevents overwriting corrupted data
Holiday file parse issues - Warning when lines in holidays.md couldn't be parsed
Invalid holiday time range - Warning when a holiday entry has end time before start time (e.g., 14:00-13:00)
Duplicate holiday dates - Warning when multiple entries exist for the same date
Unknown entry types - Info message when timer entries have types not defined in settings
Balance start date after first entry - Info message when balance start date is after your first work entry
Internationalization Improvements
Replaced hardcoded Norwegian strings in System Status with proper i18n translations
All new warnings available in both Norwegian and English
Bug Fixes
Fixed promise handling in comment modal event listeners (Obsidian review compliance)
Fixed system status not updating after adding/editing/deleting entries via calendar context menu
Fixed holiday file parser incorrectly counting documentation bullet points as parse errors
Data Fixes
Combined 2027-05-17 duplicate entries (Grunnlovsdag and Andre pinsedag fall on same date)

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
New Features
Comment System for Timer Entries
Added optional comment field to timer entries
Comment modal appears when stopping a timer
Comments are displayed in the history table (new column after "Type")
Comments visible in calendar day context menu (truncated with full text on hover)
Comments included in CSV exports
Overtime Comment Requirement
New toggle: "Require comment on overtime" (enabled by default)
When enabled, comment is mandatory if daily work exceeds goal + threshold
Configurable threshold (default: 0.5 hours over daily goal)
Configurable effective date (older entries not affected)
Skip button disabled when comment is required
Settings moved under "Work time limits" section
CSV Export Improvements
Added export button to history section header
Month selection modal with dropdown
"All months" option to export everything
Includes monthly statistics and type breakdown
Comments included in export
UTF-8 BOM for Excel compatibility
Settings export now uses the same modal
UI Improvements
History view now responsive with ResizeObserver (auto-switches between narrow/wide layouts)
Comment column in history table (editable in edit mode)
Comment display in narrow view as subtitle row
Settings Changes
Overtime comment settings moved from separate subsection to "Work time limits"
Added enable/disable toggle for overtime comments feature
Threshold and date settings only visible when feature is enabled

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes
Active timer flextime calculation: Fixed incorrect flextime display for active timers when multiple work sessions exist on the same day
Balance stability while working: Flextime balance no longer drops when starting a timer - balance stays stable until the timer is stopped
Missing days now affect balance: Workdays with no logged entries now subtract the daily goal from your balance, serving as a warning for missing data
Mobile stats layout: Fixed bar chart positioning in stats section with proper spacing from stat boxes
Code Quality
Upgraded esbuild from 0.19.9 to 0.25.0 to fix security vulnerability
Removed unused variable flagged by review bot
Fixed sentence case violations in UI text

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes
Active timer flextime calculation: Fixed incorrect flextime display for active timers when multiple work sessions exist on the same day. The active timer now correctly shows remaining flex based on all work done today, not just its own duration.
Balance includes active timers: Flextime balance badge and stats now include hours from running timers in real-time, instead of only counting completed entries.
Mobile stats layout: Fixed bar chart positioning in stats section - chart now stays at the bottom with proper spacing from stat boxes above.
Obsidian Review Fixes
Fixed sentence case violations in UI text (placeholders, dropdown options, notice messages)
Changed format placeholders to lowercase (hh:mm, yyyy-mm-dd)
Fixed unhandled promises in modal callbacks
Used type predicates to avoid unnecessary type assertions

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
CSS/Styling
Migrated ~300+ inline styles from JavaScript to styles.css
Created semantic CSS classes with CSS custom properties (--tf-bg, --tf-color, --tf-rotate, --tf-max-height, --tf-opacity, --tf-left, --tf-right, --tf-width)
Fixed calendar cell text colors not respecting user settings
Migrated remaining dynamic inline styles to CSS custom properties via setCssProps()
Fixed collapsible section headers not vertically centering when collapsed
Code Quality
Replaced all confirm() browser dialogs with Obsidian-compatible ConfirmModal (6 instances)
Fixed hasOwnProperty access to use Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call()
Replaced deprecated substr() with substring()
Replaced innerHTML usage with Obsidian DOM APIs
Fixed as TFile casts to use instanceof TFile checks
Removed unnecessary type assertions (10 instances)
Replaced any types with proper types or unknown with type guards (9 instances)
Removed unused variables across multiple files (9 instances)
Fixed operand type error in duration display logic
Used type predicates in filter() to avoid non-null assertions
Async/Promise Handling
Added void operator for intentionally unhandled promises (11 instances)
Removed unnecessary async from functions without await
Removed await from non-Promise values (5 instances)
Fixed onClose() to properly return Promise<void>
Updated modal callback types to accept void | Promise<void>
Commands & UI Text
Removed plugin name from command IDs (open-timeflow → open-dashboard)
Fixed sentence case in UI text throughout the plugin (60+ instances)
Renamed "Advanced settings" info box to "Advanced configuration"
Migrated section headings to use new Setting().setHeading() API (19 instances)
Changed date/time format placeholders to lowercase (YYYY-MM-DD → yyyy-mm-dd, HH:MM → hh:mm)
Simplified button text to lowercase after symbols ("+ Add period" → "+ add period")
Simplified settings descriptions (removed redundant technical references)
Simplified language selector labels for consistency
Cleanup
Removed unused messageGenerator.ts file
Removed unused variables (getLocale, gridPosition, totalHours, workDaysSetting)
Removed unused files (nul, planned-updates/)
Removed unnecessary ESLint directive from i18n

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Bug Fixes:
Fixed unknown entry types (e.g., "Block 1" from Timekeep imports) being calculated incorrectly as "accumulate" types instead of regular work
Fixed past planned days with reduce_goal types (egenmelding, sykemelding, velferdspermisjon) not being converted to history entries when added retroactively
Improvements:
Multi-day planned absences now automatically skip weekends (unless weekends are configured as work days in settings)

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
New Features
Edit planned days from calendar: Added "Edit [type]" option in the calendar context menu when clicking on a day with a planned absence
View planned day details (type, date, times if applicable)
Edit the description/comment
Delete the entry with confirmation
Bug Fixes
Fixed active timer display in history: The active timer section now properly updates the running duration at the same interval as the day card
Fixed modal input fields: Added additional event handlers to prevent Obsidian from intercepting keyboard input in all modal dialogs (log work, edit work, register absence, etc.)
Fixed calendar not updating after deleting planned days: The calendar, stats, week, and day cards now properly refresh after editing or deleting a planned day
Fixed holidays cache not clearing on reload: loadHolidays() now clears the holidays cache before reloading, ensuring deleted entries are properly removed from the UI
Improvements
Norwegian translations for "Other" templates: Default annet templates (Doctor, Dentist, Funeral) now display correctly in Norwegian (Lege, Tannlege, Begravelse)
Active timer updates in history: The active timer display in the history section now updates at the same frequency as the day card

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
### Features
- **Add absence type button restored** - Re-added the "Add absence type" button in settings with explanatory text distinguishing full absence types from "Other templates"
- **Multi-day support for absence types** - When adding vacation, sick leave, etc., you can now check "Multiple days" to add a date range at once (creates separate entries for each day)
- **Other (Annet) templates** - New lightweight template system for one-off absences like doctor appointments, dentist, funeral, etc.
- **Hide Empty Statistics Setting**
- New setting `hideEmptyStats` to hide statistics with 0 hours/days
- Reduces visual clutter on the dashboard
- **Hours Bar Chart**
- Added weekly hours visualization bar chart in stats card
- Shows target line and weekly/monthly hour comparisons
### Bug Fixes
- **Annet entries now appear in history** - Fixed bug where "Other" (annet) entries from holidays.md were not being converted to history entries. Both full-day and partial-day annet entries now appear correctly.
- **Calendar infobox shows entry type** - Fixed the calendar popup to show the type name along with description (e.g., "🌴 Vacation: Summer trip" instead of just "🌴 Summer trip"). For annet entries with templates, shows the template name (e.g., "🏥 Doctor: Annual checkup").
- **English language fixes** - Fixed hardcoded Norwegian text in settings for "Other templates" feature. Default templates now use English names (doctor, dentist, funeral) when in English mode.
- **Planned days display** - Improved display of "Other" entries in the planned days list to show template icon/label, time range, and description.
- **Custom entry UI** - Name and icon fields now show immediately when selecting "Custom" in the Other entry modal, not just when clicking "Save as template".
- **Flextime Calculation**
- Fixed `getBalanceUpToDate()` not handling accumulate-type entries (studie, kurs) correctly - they were subtracting from balance when hours were below goal, instead of contributing 0
- Fixed `noHoursRequired` days with logged hours being ignored instead of counting as bonus flextime (like working on weekends)
- **Settings & Defaults**
- Fixed form default for `noHoursRequired` - was `true`, now `false` (prevented accidental misconfiguration when editing behaviors)
- Added migration to convert interval settings from milliseconds to seconds (fixes users with old settings where updateInterval was 30000 instead of 30)
- **Update Intervals**
- Fixed `updateAll()` not refreshing data from timerManager before updating cards
- Added `updateMonthCard()` to periodic updates (was missing)
- Added history edit toggle visibility check to periodic updates (edit button now appears correctly in wide mode without needing to switch views)
### UI Improvements
- Planned days section now shows 15 entries when `hideEmptyStats` is OFF (more stats visible = taller card) and 10 when ON
- Added "Mål"/"Target" label on left side of bar chart target line
### Settings
- Changed `hideEmptyStats` default from `true` to `false`
- Added `showInTimerDropdown` property to special day behaviors
- Added toggle in special day edit modal for "Show in timer dropdown"
- Made jobb, studie, kurs default to showing in timer dropdown
### i18n
- Added translation keys for multi-day UI (`multipleDays`, `startDate`, `endDate`)
- Added translation keys for absence types section in settings
- Added unit translations (`day`, `days`, `hours`)
- Added `invalidDateRange` validation message
- Added `stats.weekPrefix` translation key - uses "W" for English, "U" for Norwegian in bar chart week labels
- Added `stats.target` translation key for "Mål"/"Target" label on bar chart target line

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Update interval now displays seconds instead of milliseconds. 
- Changed the flextime balance stat to display 7h 30min instead of 7.5h.
### Internationalization (i18n) Fixes
- Fixed system status message "Loaded X planned days" showing in English when Norwegian language is selected
- Added proper translations for all timer notifications (started, stopped, deleted)
- Fixed 16 hardcoded Norwegian strings in work time logging and editing modals
- Fixed hardcoded English strings in import functionality
- Fixed error messages for note creation now using proper translations
### Files affected
- All user-facing notifications now respect the selected language setting
- Timer, validation, and notification messages are now fully localized

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- ### Obsidian Developer Guidelines Compliance
	- **Security**
		- Removed `innerHTML` usage - replaced with safe DOM methods (`textContent`, `createSpan`)
	- **Code Quality**
		- Removed non-error console logging (5 instances across main.ts, dataManager.ts, timerManager.ts)
		- Added `normalizePath()` for all user-defined file paths (cross-platform compatibility)
	- **UI Text (Sentence Case)**
		- Fixed command names: "Open timeflow dashboard", "Start timer", "Stop all timers", "Import timekeep data"
		- Fixed settings section headers: "Absence types", "Display & interface", "File paths & templates", "Data management", "Advanced settings"
		- Fixed collapsible subsections: "Work schedule history", "Work time limits", "Balance calculation", "Balance color thresholds", "Data validation thresholds", "Custom colors"
		- Fixed modal titles and UI labels throughout settings

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
**Division by Zero Protection**
- Added guard to prevent division by zero in flextime proportion calculation when `totalWorkHours` is 0
**Egenmelding/Sick Day Stats Not Counting**
- Fixed `getSpecialDayStats()` to count full-day sick leave entries (0 duration) from data.md
- Previously, reduce_goal types were only counted from holidays.md, missing entries stored in data.md
**Sykemelding Stats Missing**
- Added missing `stats.sykemelding.count` assignment in `getStatistics()`
**Weekend/Workday Detection**
- Moved weekend detection outside the entry loop to prevent same day being added to both weekend and workday sets
- Fixed date parsing by adding `T12:00:00` to avoid timezone issues
**Work Intensity Percentage Incorrect for Part-Time**
- Fixed work intensity stat to account for `workPercent` setting
- Previously compared average weekly hours against full-time `baseWorkweek` (e.g., 37.5h)
- Now compares against `baseWorkweek * workPercent` (e.g., 18.75h for 50% role)
- A 50% worker doing their expected hours now correctly shows ~100% instead of ~50%
**Egenmelding Stats Showing Wrong Count for Month View**
- Fixed egenmelding display to respect the selected timeframe filter
- Previously always used `getSpecialDayStats()` which counts by year/rolling-365 period
- Now uses `stats.egenmelding.count` for month view (correctly filtered by `getStatistics()`)
- Year view still uses `getSpecialDayStats()` for rolling period and max days display
**Code Improvements**
**Behavior-Based Filtering (Future-Proofing)**
- Replaced hard-coded type name lists with behavior property checks throughout:
    
    - `getCurrentWeekHours()` - now uses `flextimeEffect` checks instead of `["avspasering", "egenmelding", "velferdspermisjon", "ferie"]`
    - `getTodayHours()` - filters by `isWorkType` and `flextimeEffect === 'accumulate'`
    - `getWeekTotals()` - same behavior-based filtering
    - `getStatistics()` - uses behavior properties for categorization
- This ensures custom user-created absence types work correctly based on their configured behavior, not just built-in type names
- **Additional Behavior-Based Filtering**

- `validateData()` - now uses behavior checks instead of hard-coded `["ferie", "egenmelding", "sykemelding", "velferdspermisjon"]`
- `timerManager.ts` avspasering check - now uses `behavior?.flextimeEffect === 'withdraw'` instead of `name === "avspasering"`

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Flextime calculation - When a `reduce_goal` entry (egenmelding, sykemelding, velferdspermisjon) has 0 duration, it now reduces the goal by the full daily amount instead of 0.
- Context menu info display - The filter now includes `reduce_goal` entries with 0 duration, and displays them with "(Hel dag)" / "(Full day)" text.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- When a day has both work and special entries, shows a 4px stripe at the bottom
	- **Dominant type** = main cell background
	- **Secondary type** = stripe color
	- Priority: Full-day types (`noHoursRequired`/`countsAsWorkday`) always dominant, otherwise duration wins
	- Uses colors from `specialDayBehaviors` first, falls back to legacy `specialDayColors`
- Fixed the context menu click, so it behave like the compliance badges.
- Fixed the negative flextime color. It wasn't displaying when the entry was below the goal.
- Changed terminology from "Special days" to "Absence". Shows more clearly what it is.
- Changed the order of the stat views. Now the default view is month instead of total.
- Example comments for the absence types are now relevant to the absence.
- Made weekend work, when not chosen as workdays, use the 2 entry stripe if the work is lower than workday/2
- Fixed the color swatches in the information section to use the color set in settings for the absence types.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
New Features
Sick Day Goal Reduction
When you leave work early due to sickness, egenmelding/sykemelding hours now reduce your daily goal instead of counting against your flextime
Example: If you work 6 hours and register 1.5 hours of egenmelding, your effective daily goal becomes 6 hours (7.5 - 1.5), resulting in 0 flextime impact instead of -1.5 hours
Partial sick days do NOT count towards your egenmelding/sykemelding day limit - only full sick days count
Smart Sick Day Registration
New clock-based time inputs for registering partial sick days (From/To fields instead of duration)
Auto-fills remaining time: If you worked until 13:58, the sick time automatically fills in 13:58 as the start time and calculates the end time based on remaining hours needed to reach your daily goal
"Full day" checkbox for quick full-day sick leave registration (unchecked by default when work entries exist)
Work Schedule History
Track changes to your work schedule over time (work percent, base workday, work days)
Historical flextime calculations now use the schedule that was active on each date
Supports future-dated schedule changes that automatically take effect on their start date
Automatic migration creates an initial period from your current settings
New Flextime Effect: reduce_goal
Added new flextime behavior option for special day types
Applied to egenmelding, sykemelding, and velferdspermisjon by default
Configurable per special day type in settings
Improvements
Automatic migration updates existing egenmelding/sykemelding/velferdspermisjon settings to use the new reduce_goal behavior
Duration display shows calculated hours in the sick day modal
Added translations for "Full day" checkbox (Norwegian and English)
Technical Changes
Added getScheduleForDate() in dataManager.ts to retrieve historical work schedules
Modified getDailyGoal() to use schedule-specific settings for each date
Modified calculateFlextime() to handle reduce_goal entries
Modified getBalanceUpToDate() to calculate effective goal after sick day reductions
Modified getSpecialDayStats() to only count full days for reduce_goal types
Updated showSpecialDayModal with new time-based input UI
Added reduce_goal option to SpecialDayBehaviorModal dropdown
Added workScheduleHistory setting with automatic migration from current settings

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- ensure that entries with `noHoursRequired` or `countsAsWorkday` behaviors (like egenmelding, ferie, helligdag) will no longer have their hours added to `dayWorked`
- changed the clock/time picker is a text field instead of a menu where you pick the entry. Feels more usable to write than to scroll.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Fixed the position of the week number badge inside the week card.
- Fixed the color gradient for flextime work days, now it should be less "white" at goal time.
- how unknown entry types (like "Block 1", "Block 2") are treated:
	- Before:
		- `noHoursRequired: true` → full hours counted as bonus flextime
		- `flextimeEffect: 'none'` → no goal reduction
	- After:
		- `noHoursRequired: false` → hours count toward daily goal
		- `flextimeEffect: 'accumulate'` → works like regular "jobb" entries

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
The `getSpecialDayBehavior` function now does a case-insensitive comparison, so "Jobb", "jobb", and "JOBB" will all match correctly.
Fixed special day entries from data.md not recognized - Ferie, egenmelding, and other special day entries that exist only in data.md (not holidays.md) now:
Display correct colors in the calendar
Have 0 work goal (no negative flextime impact)
Show properly in context menu instead of "no registration"
This fixes issues with legacy data and imported Timekeep data
Fixed midnight timestamp timezone issues - Changed special day entries from using T00:00:00 to T08:00:00 to prevent JavaScript date parsing from shifting dates due to timezone interpretation
Added automatic migration for midnight timestamps - Existing entries with T00:00:00 timestamps are automatically converted to T08:00:00 on load
Added backward compatibility for countsAsWorkday property - Legacy special day behaviors using countsAsWorkday: true (instead of noHoursRequired: true) are now properly recognized

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
The save function relied on Obsidian's vault cache (`getAbstractFileByPath`) which can be out of sync with the actual file system. This could happen when:
1. The file exists on disk but isn't indexed by Obsidian yet
2. A sync service (like Obsidian Sync) created the file between the check and the create call
3. Multiple save operations running concurrently
The fix:
4. Uses `adapter.exists()` to check the actual file system instead of the vault cache
5. Falls back to `adapter.write()` if the file exists on disk but isn't in the vault cache
6. Catches the "File already exists" error and retries with `adapter.write()` to handle race conditions
issue with vacation days (ferie) being counted as "weekdays worked" when calculating the average workload, even though they contributed 0 hours.
Example:
- **Before**: 8 weekdays counted (including 5 ferie days), ~24 hours total → 40% workload
- **After**: Only 3 actual work days counted, ~24 hours total → ~100% workload (since 3 days × 7.5h = 22.5h expected, and ~24h worked)
The fix now:
1. Only counts days that have actual work entries (entries where `isWorkType: true` and `duration > 0`)
2. Only sums hours from work type entries (not vacation, sick leave, etc.)

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Fixed timer controls disappearing: In simple tracking mode (no goal tracking), the timer start/stop button and clock badge were hidden - now only goal-related badges are hidden
Fixed calendar showing wrong colors: Work entries ('jobb') were being matched as special entries, causing green cells instead of the configured simple color. Now excludes work types from special entry matching
Internationalization (i18n)
Fixed Norwegian text in English mode:
"Legg til" buttons → now uses t('buttons.add')
"Type dag:" → now uses t('modals.dayType')
"Kommentar (valgfritt):" → now uses t('modals.commentOptional')
"+ Legg til ny oppføring" → added t('ui.addNewEntry')
Modal title → now uses t('modals.addEntryTitle')
Stop button "Stopp" → now uses t('buttons.stop')
Menu tip "Velg et alternativ..." → now uses t('menu.selectOption')
Comment placeholder "Ferie i Spania" → now uses t('modals.commentPlaceholder')
Simple Tracking Mode (No Goal Tracking)
Added customizable work day color: New simpleColor and simpleTextColor properties for work types, configurable in the work type modal
Hidden goal-related UI elements: Work days color gradient info, flextime balance zones, and week compliance status are now hidden when goal tracking is disabled
Updated calendar and heatmap: Both now use the configured simpleColor (default light blue #90caf9) instead of flextime gradient colors
UI Improvements
Active timer indicator: Changed from green (#4caf50) to white with dark border for visibility on any background color
Week badge on mobile: Made smaller on narrow screens (under 400px) to prevent overlap with "denne uken"/"this week" text

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Compliance info box positioning on mobile - Added bounds checking so the panel stays within the viewport. It measures the panel size after rendering, then adjusts `top` and `right` values to keep it on screen.
- History sorting - newest first - Added `.sort().reverse()` to both years and months so they appear in descending order (December before November, 2025 before 2024).
- Month name headers - Added visible month name headers (e.g., "Desember", "November") above each month's table in both wide and narrow list views.
- Removed fixed height - The history container no longer has a 500px max-height limit
- Collapsible years - Each year is now a `<details>` element that can be expanded/collapsed
- Current year expanded by default - The current year (2025) will be open, older years will be collapsed
- Visual indicator - Arrow (▼/▶) shows the expand/collapse state
- Now when there are multiple entries with the same name (like two "jobb" entries), each processed entry will be matched to a different raw entry, so they'll show their correct individual start/end times.
- ISO String format consistency + data migration
    - Changed new entry creation in modal to use `Utils.toLocalISOString()` instead of `.toISOString()`
    - Added `normalizeEntryTimestamps()` function in timerManager.ts that automatically migrates existing entries with UTC 'Z' format to local ISO format on load
- Fix timezone context in inline edits
    - Already using `Utils.toLocalISOString()` for inline edits
- Add time input validation
    - Added `parseTimeInput()` helper that validates hours (0-23) and minutes (0-59)
    - Applied to all time inputs: start time edits, end time edits, and add entry modal
    - Shows error notice and rejects invalid input
- Show notice for date boundary auto-fix
    - Added `endTimeNextDay` translation for when end time is automatically set to next day
    - Shows notice to inform user when this happens
- Use work type from settings for Start button
    - Start button now uses first `isWorkType` from settings instead of hardcoded 'jobb'
- Add save error handling
    - Added `saveWithErrorHandling()` wrapper method
    - Shows notice on save failure
    - Applied to all 14 save calls in uiBuilder.ts
- Improve entry matching logic
    - Entry matching now first tries to match by name + startTime for better accuracy
    - Removed fallback to index-based matching which could edit wrong entries
- Validate subEntries structure
    - Added `Array.isArray()` checks before iterating over subEntries in 3 locations
- Now `softRefreshHistory()` should properly find and refresh the history section when you delete entries.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Flextime tracking disabled when no goal tracking is on. 
- hovering over the heatmap cells caused the whole section to shift. 
- Added a setting for displaying the special day color in the heatmap.
- Workload stat didn't account for vacation or other special days, so if vacation was registered, the "workload" would drop dramatically.
- Added `isModalOpen` property [uiBuilder.ts:21] - A boolean flag to track when any modal is open
- Guarded `updateAll()` [uiBuilder.ts:5431-5432] - Now returns early if a modal is open, preventing background refresh from interfering with modal inputs
- Updated all modal methods to set and clear the flag:
    - `showWorkTimeModal` - Set on open, cleared on cancel/success
    - `showEditEntriesModal` - Set on open, cleared on close/save/delete
    - `showSpecialDayModal` - Set on open, cleared on cancel/save
    - `showAddEntryModal` - Set on open, cleared on cancel/save
- Case inconsistency: Changed `startTimer()` default from `'Jobb'` to `'jobb'` to match the rest of the codebase
- Added keyboard event `stopPropagation()` to all modals
- Edit modal changes:
	- Added date picker alongside time picker for both start and end times
	- For multi-day entries, the display now shows full date+time: `⏰ 2025-11-27 22:00 → 2025-11-28 06:30`
	- Removed the overnight shift confirmation dialog since users can now explicitly set different dates
	- Added validation that end datetime must be after start datetime 
- Inline Edit Mode (Wide View) Changes:
	- Multi-day entries now show date + time in display mode (e.g., `2025-11-28 06:30`)
	- When editing, a date picker appears above the time picker for multi-day entries
	- Single-day entries continue to show just time as before
- Now entries with invalid/corrupted `endTime` values (like `"NaN-NaN-NaNTNaN:NaN:NaN"`) will be treated as having no end time, and you'll see an empty time input where you can enter the correct end time.
- To fix your corrupted entry:
	1. Go to history, enable edit mode
	2. The entry should show an empty time input in the end time column (instead of NaN-NaN-NaN)
	3. Enter the end time (example 15:15)
	4. Press Done
	- The entry will be saved with the start date + your entered end time. If the end time is before the start time, it will automatically add a day.
- Overlap detection in history: Added 🔴 indicator with tooltip for overlapping entries. There will be an error shown in the system status field if there is overlapping entries, now you can also see which in history as well.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Special days with noHoursRequired: true were still counted in the weekly goal for the compliance badge. Compliance badge should now show the correct weekly goal.
- small visual and logic bugs with the compliance badge.
- Small version number in the system status field at the bottom.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
1.1.2 introduced a double counting bug:

- Fixed double-counting of hours - Active timers were being counted twice in the day card and week card calculations. Now getTodayHours() and getCurrentWeekHours() properly exclude active entries since getOngoing() already calculates their duration.

- Fixed flextime balance calculation - The flextime balance now only counts completed work sessions. Days with only active (in-progress) timers are excluded from the balance until the timer is stopped.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- File Watcher Race Condition
	- Added `isSaving` and `lastSaveTime` flags to [timerManager.ts]
	- Added `shouldReloadFromFile()` method to prevent reloads during/after save
	- Updated `save()` method with proper flag management in `try/finally` block
	- Updated file watcher in [main.ts] to check before reloading
	- Added missing `await` to 3 save() calls in uiBuilder.ts
- Orphaned Types Fallback
	- Updated `getSpecialDayBehavior()` in [dataManager.ts]) to return a neutral fallback for unknown types
	- Fallback uses `❓` icon, gray color, and neutral flextime effect
- Week Number Consistency
	- Fixed [utils.ts] to use ISO 8601 `Utils.getWeekNumber()` for alternating weeks
	- Fixed [dataManager.ts] to use consistent week numbering in `groupByMonths()`
- Settings Cross-Validation
	- Added to [main.ts]:
    - `halfDayHours` cannot exceed `baseWorkday`
    - Threshold ordering enforcement (criticalLow < warningLow < warningHigh < criticalHigh)
- Overlap Checking
	- Added `checkProhibitedOverlap()` helper in [uiBuilder.ts]
	- Blocks same-type overlaps AND overlaps between accumulate-type entries
	- Applied to both add and edit entry modals
- Overnight Shift Detection
	- Added `showOvernightShiftConfirmation()` method in [uiBuilder.ts]
	- When end time < start time, prompts user to confirm overnight shift
	- Automatically adds a day to end date if confirmed
- I18n Keys
	- Added `validation.overlappingEntry` (nb/en)
	- Added `confirm.overnightShiftTitle` and `confirm.overnightShift` (nb/en)
	- Updated TypeScript types in [i18n/index.ts]
- Date Validation Warning
	- Updated `parseDate()` in [importParsers.ts] to detect date rollover
	- Warns when invalid dates like `2025-02-30` are auto-corrected
- Small adjustment on flextime color gradient. 
- Show week number setting was the only setting with both norwegian and english. Now its only in english, like every other setting.
- "Jobb" removed from Special Day Modal
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4124-4129]
	- Added `.filter(behavior => !behavior.isWorkType)` to exclude work types like "jobb" from the special day dropdown
- Warning sign only on work entries
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4572-4580] (narrow view)
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4721-4729] (wide view)
	- Changed logic to only show ⚠️ warnings on actual work entries (jobb, kurs, studie) when they're logged on special days (ferie, egenmelding, sykemelding, etc.)
- Active timers at top of history
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4398-4444] - Modified `refreshHistoryView()` to extract active entries
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4474-4512] - Modified `renderListView()` to accept active entries
	- **File**: [src/uiBuilder.ts:4551-4619] - Added new `renderActiveEntriesSection()` method that displays active timers in a highlighted section at the top of the history list

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Text color in the future planned day section didn't use the color specified in the special day configuration.
- Replaced innerHTML with DOM API in key areas
- Removing console.log
- Fixed: Work on planned days with `noHoursRequired: true` (ferie, egenmelding, sykemelding) now counts all hours as flextime bonus, just like weekends
- Fixed: `-0.5` hours now displays as `-0t 30m` instead of `-0t -30m`
- Also handles edge case where rounding produces 60 minutes
- New timestamps now use local ISO format without Z suffix
- Migration function converts existing UTC timestamps to local time
- Uses `hasTimestampMigration` flag to run once per user
- All numeric settings are clamped to sensible bounds on save
- Prevents division by zero from impossible values like `workdaysPerWeek: 0`
- Subentries from TimeKeep weren't editable. You should now be able to edit those.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- English added as language
- Changes to language and consistencies in the language use.
- Removed the contextual message feature.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Removed themes. It should now follow the system theme.
- Added configurable "work"-day colors, name, icon
- Added ability to change between sidebar and "main window".
	- Default changable in settings.
	- Button to quickly change below System status
- Added filtering in historikk
- Added bulk editing in historikk when in "wide mode"
- Made informasjon two column in wide mode.
- Added explanation of the compliance badge/colors
- The planned days weren't added to historikk, so when they would have passed, they would be "gone" from statistikk etc. 
	1. **On dashboard load**, holidays are loaded from holidays.md
	2. **Past planned days** (before today) with `noHoursRequired: true` are converted to timer entries
	3. **Skip condition**: Only skips if an entry of the **same type** exists for that date
	4. **Flextime is correct**:
	    - ferie/egenmelding etc. get 0-duration entries (just markers)
	    - avspasering gets actual duration for flextime withdrawal
	    - jobb logged on ferie day correctly counts as bonus flextime (dayGoal=0)
- When registering an "avspasering" day, you get the option to fill in the hours when you will leave, if you choose to leave early instead of taking the whole day off.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
Fixed scaling of start/stop button and compliance badge
- Fixed scaling of the day/week cards and stat section. Stays in 2 column mode longer.
- Added week number. Toggle in settings to turn off.
- Dialog box when deleting entries to confirm deletion.
- Support for csv and json data import, not just TimeKeep.
- Show compliance for past weeks if you have the compliance warning setting turned on.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Reorganized settings
- Added search in settings
- "Reset to defaults" button in settings
- Key color customization
- Toggle to enable/disable contextual messages.
- "Wide" mode happens earlier when widening the sidebar.
- Click the System status field when it shows an error to read the error.
- Work time limits (based on norwegian laws), but with customizable limits.
- Change if special days should show the count for the last 365 days or calendar year
- Added "compliance" badge, if you are close to/over the limit, it will show what is outside the normal/limit:
	- **Green 🟩** - Both daily and weekly hours are within limits
	- **Orange 🟨** - Approaching either the daily (7.5h) or weekly (37.5h) limit
	- **Red 🟥** - Exceeded either the daily (9h) or weekly (40h) limit

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Adding full customization of the special days.
- Added a toggle for goal tracking. This does:
	- Pure hour tracking without goals
	- No flextime balance badge
	- Day/Week cards show only "X timer arbeidet" (hours worked)
	- Calendar uses neutral gray colors
	- Stats show only total hours, averages, and special day counts
	- Goal-related settings automatically hidden
- Terminology update. More explanation for norwegian labor terms.
- Calendar and stats should now be placed beside each other when the size of the sidebar is large enough.
- When stats and calendar are beside eachother, there will be a list of future planned days under the calendar.
- Scaling based on sidebar size and not the size of the obsidian window.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Added configurable "half" day hours. Default is 4
- Added configurable thresholds for the flex warning.
- Added configurable thresholds for long running timers and weekly hours.
- Added a toggle for removing daily/weekly goals. Users without fixed weekly schedules can now disable weekly goals for a cleaner, non-goal-oriented view while still tracking their hours.
- Added ability to choose which days are work days. If you have alternating weeks, another row appears.
- Statistikk and Informasjon had a set height, so in thin sidebar and mobile view the lower information was not shown.
- Navigation buttons in the calendar should scale smoothly now..

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
The buttons in the calendar was still too large on mobile.
- Heatmap still too small on mobile.
- When the plugin was updated, it stopped the current running timer. Hopefully that is fixed now.
- After adding a special day, the calendar should now automatically show the added day.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Automatic refresh of the plugin when the data file changes. So if you start a timer on your phone, if you have the plugin on desktop, it should autmatically refresh when the data file is synced.
- Statistikk is now collapsible, but starts open.
- Changes to styling etc. to fit Obsidian style guide, and plugin guidelines.
- The stat view buttons weren't indicating which view was selected.
- The calendar buttons were too big on mobile. Changed the scaling.
- Using the same arrow as the dropdown menu on the start button in the calendar navigation.
- Month name was centered on the calendar, now its left aligned.
- Heatmap view now has bigger day indicators.
- The start/stop button and clock are now on one row in mobile view.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
- Entries with another name than "jobb" couldn't be edited. This should work now.
- When editing entries and saving an edit, all entries were added again in the total count for hours until the plugin was reloaded. Now all entries are reprocessed from scratch with the updated data.
- Added a dropdown menu in the start timer button to start a "jobb", "kurs" and "studie" timer.
- Added indicator(⚠️) for "jobb" entries that happen on days with "ferie", "egenmelding", "sykemelding", "helligdag" and "velferdspermisjon".
- Detecting overlapping and missing entries. Indicator in the system status field at the bottom of the plugin display.

- Still alot of small adjustments needed for the different themes.

releases.author: gaut3
releases.description:
### 1.0.1
- Hopefully proper padding for the day, week and calendar cards in the mobile view
- Hopefully proper handling of the context menu on mobile.
- Historikk is now collapsible like the informasjon section.
- Statistikk can now filter based on year in the "år"-view, and year and month in "måned"-view.
- Configurable path for the data.md document in settings.

- Still alot of small adjustments needed for the different themes.

releases.author: gaut3
